PRIVACY_TITLE: // SIBYL SYSTEM DIRECTIVE: BIOMETRIC COMPLIANCE & PRIVACY DECLARATION
PRIVACY_SEC1_DESC: The SIBYL System Biometric Scanner Node executes simulated capture of the citizen's anatomical and psychological signals in real-time. This diagnostic operation analyzes:
PRIVACY_SEC1_ITEM1: Frequency Cardiaque (Heart Rate): Tracks sympathetic heart fluctuations to detect anxiety indicators.
PRIVACY_SEC1_ITEM2: Dilatation Pupillaire (Pupil Dilation): Evaluates pupillary adjustments reacting to emotional volatility markers.
PRIVACY_SEC1_ITEM3: Fréquence Respiratoire (Respiratory Rate): Measures breath cycles to evaluate cognitive stability.
PRIVACY_SEC1_ITEM4: Schéma Cérébral (Cerebral Brainwaves): Simulates neural waves to confirm aggregate stress ratios.
PRIVACY_SEC2_DESC: To secure the citizen's psychological baseline integrity, the biometric scanner operates under Webcam Privacy Mask (Option 2). Camera feeds are visually hidden in the browser via CSS styling variables (rendered at 1px by 1px with 0% opacity). The background video stream feed is processed strictly client-side to drive interactive telemetry locks; no video recordings or raw frames are ever saved, stored, or transmitted to external servers.
PRIVACY_SEC3_DESC: Calculated Crime Coefficient (CC) metrics and scan timestamps are recorded within the local SQLite database registry ('citizen.db') under strict cryptographic hashing to construct user profile trends. History tracking is restricted to authorized profiles and is automatically deleted upon user profile deletion or session logouts.
PRIVACY_SEC4_DESC: Citizen identification status is managed using standard HTTP cookie tokens. Cookies utilize strict session life-cycles containing no persistence headers, ensuring authorization records are automatically wiped from client hardware upon closing the browser tab or closing the browser.
PRIVACY_SEC5_DESC: This terminal is registered on the Umami Cloud Analytics platform. Collected telemetry is restricted to route transitions and custom event logs (e.g. biometric scans initiated, terminal commands executed) to measure system node performance. No personal identifiers, passwords, or individual psycho-pass metrics are transmitted.
TERMS_TITLE: // SIBYL SYSTEM DIRECTIVE: CITIZEN COMPLIANCE CONTRACT & TERMS OF SERVICE
TERMS_STATUS: SECURITY STATUS: MANDATORY SYSTEM INTEGRITY OBLIGATIONS
TERMS_SEC1_DESC: By accessing the SIBYL System interface nodes, the citizen consents to continuous, real-time biometric scanning and cognitive diagnostics. This includes facial feature analysis, heart rate telemetry tracking, and language-based psychological profiling. All signals are processed to estimate the citizen's Crime Coefficient (CC).
TERMS_SEC2_DESC: Should the citizen's Crime Coefficient exceed the optimal threshold of 100, the system will trigger mandatory therapeutic Calming Protocols. Citizens are required to participate in the paced breathing cycle stabilization sequence. Failure to cooperate or attempt to bypass the therapeutic cycle may result in automatic notification of local Public Safety Bureau enforcers.
TERMS_SEC3_DESC: Any citizen with a Crime Coefficient exceeding 300 is classified as a severe threat to public safety. Under the Sibyl System rules, the citizen's enforcement status will immediately escalate to 'Lethal Eliminator'. In this state, local law enforcement units are authorized to execute complete neutralization protocols. The citizen waives all rights of recourse against automated system evaluations.
TERMS_SEC4_DESC: Citizens must maintain an accurate cognitive identifier and securing keypin credential. Impersonating other citizens, sharing encryption credentials, or attempting to artificially scramble biometric signals is a Class-A violation, resulting in immediate criminal baseline classification.
TERMS_SEC5_DESC: Access to the terminal command-line interface (CLI) is provided for official diagnostic query purposes only. Unauthorized attempts to exploit the database nodes, reverse-engineer the Empathy AI logic, or bypass the session cookie lifetime controls are strictly prohibited and monitored by system security protocols.
SEO_HOME_TITLE: Sibyl System - Psycho-Pass Scanner & Cognitive Terminal
SEO_HOME_DESC: Access the Sibyl System terminal interface. Perform real-time biometric Psycho-Pass scans, measure your Crime Coefficient, and run cognitive stability diagnostics.
SEO_AUTH_DESC: Declassify your biometrics and authorize your security compliance ID to access the Sibyl System core interface.
SEO_REGISTER_TITLE: Sibyl System - Citizen Registration / Compliance ID
SEO_REGISTER_DESC: Create your Sibyl System compliance ID to begin psychological telemetry monitoring and diagnostic updates.
SEO_PRIVACY_TITLE: Sibyl System - Biometric Compliance & Privacy Policy
SEO_PRIVACY_DESC: Official declaration regarding the scope of biometric scans, video feed masking, database logging, and HTTP cookie lifecycles on the Sibyl System interface.
SEO_TERMS_TITLE: Sibyl System - Citizen Compliance Contract & Terms
SEO_TERMS_DESC: Terms of service detailing biometric diagnostic consent, crime coefficient thresholds, calming protocols, and legal enforcements of the Sibyl System.
SEO_TRENDS_TITLE: Sibyl System - Psychological Trend History Logs
SEO_TRENDS_DESC: Analyze your historical cognitive logs, biometric histograms, and Crime Coefficient fluctuations recorded by the Sibyl System.
SEO_ACCOUNT_TITLE: Sibyl System - Citizen Profile & Account Settings
SEO_ACCOUNT_DESC: Manage your cognitive identifier, security pass keypin, and biometric avatar profile in the Sibyl System registry.
NET_NO_ACTIVE: NO ACTIVE COGNITIVE SYNC CHANNELS IN REGISTRY.
NET_ERR_SELF: ERROR: CANNOT ESTABLISH SYNC LINK WITH SELF.
NET_ERR_NOT_FOUND: ERROR: CITIZEN NOT REGISTERED IN SYSTEM CORE.
NET_ERR_DUPLICATE: ERROR: SYNC REQUEST OR LINK ALREADY EXISTS.
CITIZEN_RESTRICTED_DESC: THE COGNITIVE DATA OF THIS CITIZEN IS ENCRYPTED. YOU MUST ESTABLISH AND ACCEPT A COMPLIANCE SYNC REQUEST TO VIEW THEIR TELEMETRY.
ACC_DISCORD_ALREADY_LINKED: ERROR: THIS DISCORD ACCOUNT IS ALREADY LINKED TO ANOTHER CITIZEN.
REG_PASSWORD_RULES: 8-30 characters, at least 1 uppercase letter, 1 lowercase letter and 1 digit. _ and / allowed.
AUTH_ERR_PASSWORD_STRENGTH: REGISTRATION REJECTED: PASSWORD COMPOSITION CRITERIA NOT MET.
AUTH_ERR_USERNAME_LENGTH: REGISTRATION REJECTED: USERNAME MUST BE BETWEEN 1 AND 15 CHARACTERS.
COM_SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: SEARCH BY CITIZEN ID OR USERNAME
INVITE_SERVER_DESC: Integrate Sibyl System into a Discord server to monitor collective Psycho-Pass and maintain compliance.
INVITE_USER_DESC: Install Sibyl System directly to your personal profile for localized use across any workspace.
INVITE_WARNING: Deployment of Sibyl System grants monitoring capabilities over communications. Strict adherence to Sibyl Protocol is mandatory.
PRIVACY_SEC6_DESC: Text inputs submitted to the terminal are transmitted to a third-party AI provider (Google Gemini API) to generate cognitive analysis and Crime Coefficient approximations. No personally identifiable information is intentionally attached to these prompts.
PRIVACY_SEC7_DESC: If a citizen links their Discord account, the SIBYL system stores their Discord ID and username. Diagnostic scans may trigger automated webhook alerts to designated Discord channels. Depending on the system administrative settings, your scan results and identity may be broadcasted to these channels regardless of your local privacy mode.
TERMS_SEC6_DESC: The citizen acknowledges that biometric scans and Crime Coefficient evaluations may be broadcasted to designated Discord channels. Administrative enforcement nodes may bypass local privacy settings to ensure public safety.
TERMS_SEC7_DESC: The SIBYL System is strictly a roleplay and entertainment experience. The generated 'Crime Coefficient', psychological analysis, and therapy protocols are produced by artificial intelligence and simulated algorithms. They do not constitute actual medical, psychiatric, or law enforcement advice. Citizens experiencing real mental health crises should contact professional emergency services.
CHAT_MOD_POPUP_DESC: A transmission has been redacted due to Psycho-Pass clouding. CC penalty applied:
CHAT_ERR_DESKTOP_NOTIFS: Your browser does not support desktop notifications.
GRP_HINT_MAX_CC: Citizens exceeding this CC cannot join or communicate.
